summary: Backend-only verification completed for startup live-order recovery and reconciliation changes. Build passed, live execution hardening probe passed, runtime backend regression passed, and worker timeout recovery probe passed. Tested exchanges are MOCKED in probes.
action_items: Keep startup recovery assertions in CI (recoverLiveOrdersOnStartup + openOrders-first sync + fallback via getOrder).
Optional hardening: add explicit assertion in regression probe that missing openOrders method still falls back to getOrder path without state corruption.
critical_code_review_comments: executionEngine.ts is 851 lines (>700 guideline); split sync/recovery/live-order orchestration into focused modules to reduce regression risk.
privateApi.ts uses hardcoded default baseUrl fallback; consider environment-driven configuration only for stricter deployment controls.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Isolated DATA_DIR under /tmp used for each probe run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed: (1) yarn build (2) TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-live LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-live/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-live/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/live_execution_hardening_probe.ts (3) TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-reg LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-reg/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-reg/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/runtime_backend_regression.ts (4) TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=testtoken TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USER_IDS=1 DATA_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-timeout LOG_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-timeout/logs TEMP_DIR=/tmp/mafiamarkets-it4-timeout/tmp yarn tsx /app/tests/worker_timeout_probe.ts.
